message:
Add comprehensive tests for db/patterns.go (0% → 90%+ coverage)

Tests for all 13 pattern change functions:
- CreatePatternChange with defaults and explicit values
- GetPatternChange and ErrPatternChangeNotFound
- List functions (pending, by status, by type, all)
- UpdatePatternChangeStatus, ApprovePatternChange, RejectPatternChange
- DeletePatternChange with double-delete test
- CountPendingPatternChanges with state transitions
- Ordering test to verify DESC sort by created_at

Overall db package now at 90.1% coverage, meeting target.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
